build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(40, 40, 5)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(15).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=5).rect(36, 36).extrude(3)

STEP 4: Create square section — .faces("<Z").workplane().rect(40, 40).extrude(5)

STEP 5: Loft transition from square to round — 
    - Create a workplane at the center of the base plate
    - Draw a polyline representing the path from the square to the circle
    - Use .loft() operation with the created polyline as the guide curve
